◎简　　介  

　　Daniel, a young man serving time in a Spanish prison for abetting a crime. A bad cop, Guillermo, visits the prisoner because he knows of Daniel's role in the murder. At the same time, Guillermo, who is gay, seems to develop an attraction to Daniel, but will never tell him how he feels about him.
